name: HaruCon Grimstad
description:
HaruCon is a free, family-friendly nerd-culture event hosted at Grimstad bibliotek. The convention gathers fans of anime, manga, cosplay, fantasy and gaming for a weekend of panels, workshops and competitions.

The programme is aimed at youth and includes cosplay contests and various smaller competitions across the library's spaces.
notes: No standalone .no domain — site is on Wix. Logo is the small site mark from the Wix header (200x200 PNG); banner is the FB cover image used as the hero on the homepage (1200x628). Single-day event listing — only the 2026-04-25 date was confirmed across sources, so endDate is null. Description paraphrased from the Wix about copy and Grimstad bibliotek's event page.
